title: Process Technician
description:
Position Summary:

We are looking for a New Product Introduction Process Technician to join our growing Life Cycle Management (LCM) team to support new process development and process improvements for our manufacturing processes. The Process Technician will work with cross functional departments such as Automation and Manufacturing Sciences to execute analyses and/or studies for new products and improve manufacturing processes of existing products.


Position Responsibilities:

  • Own and execute experiments both in the laboratory and indoor manufacturing environments.
  • Operate automation lines and prepare materials required for the experiments.
  • Operate laboratory instruments such as pipettes, ICP-MS, FTIR, Spectrophotometers, SEM, Confocal Image analyses.
  • Partner with Engineers for complex experiment executions.
  • Prepare reports and/or PowerPoint slides on study results.

Listed responsibilities are an essential, but not exhaustive list, of the usual duties associated with the position. Changes to individual responsibilities may occur due to business needs.


Position Requirements:

  • Diploma in Science/ Engineering or equivalent in Chemical, Biochemical, Pharmaceutical, Material Science, Biochemistry and/or Bio-related field.
  • High degree of initiative and ownership, as well as being comfortable to with working with several different departments in a fast-paced environment
  • Experience in laboratory and/or manufacturing environment is desired.
  • Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail required.
  • Demonstrated ability to work independently.
  • Excellent verbal/written communication skills.

All listed requirements are deemed as essential functions to this position; however, business conditions may require reasonable accommodation for additional task and responsibilities.

postedCompany.description:
ILLUMINA SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

At Illumina, our goal is to apply innovative technologies to the analysis of genetic variation and function, making studies possible that were not even imaginable just a few years ago. It is mission critical for us to deliver innovative, flexible, and scalable solutions to meet the needs of our customers. As a global company, we strive to meet this challenge – we do this through placing high value on collaborative interactions, offering rapid delivery of solutions, and providing the highest level of quality.  Illumina's innovative sequencing and array technologies are fueling groundbreaking advancements in life science research, translational and consumer genomics, and molecular diagnostics.
